title: juncus × brueggeri
intro: Juncus × brueggeri, also known as Bruegger's rush, is a hybrid plant species within the Juncaceae family. This aquatic plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Juncus × brueggeri include its potential to treat coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions. The plant is commonly prepared as an infusion, and in some cases, it is also used to make a tincture, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
